state.output:
<path>/private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import test from 'node:test'
2: import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
3: import { add } from './src/math.mjs'
4: 
5: for (let index = 0; index < 80; index += 1) {
6:   test(`add case ${index}`, () => {
7:     assert.equal(add(index, 2), index + 2)
8:   })
9: }

(End of file - total 9 lines)
</content>
state.title: bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

part.text: The bug is clear: `src/math.mjs` implements `add(a, b)` as `a - b` but it should return `a + b`.

input.description: Run math tests to verify fix

part.text:
## Diagnosis & Fix Summary

**Root Cause**: `src/math.mjs:2` returned `a - b` instead of `a + b`.

**Fix Applied**: Changed subtraction to addition in `src/math.mjs`.

**Verification Status**: ✅ All 80 tests pass (`pass 80, fail 0`)

```
node --test bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs
```
